executionHistory.summary: Read-only UX provenance reconciliation confirmed the existing Graph API activation contract covers daily and returning users, operators, screen inventory, desktop and mobile composition, keyboard and screen-reader behavior, closed honest states, state-specific recovery, and real-stack Playwright-visible outcomes. No spec change, runtime, config, secret, browser, API, store, test, evidence, design, plan, implementation, certification, commit, push, or deployment is claimed.

Replaced the placeholder technical design with a code-grounded fail-loud Graph API activation architecture: one composite authorized graph-read capability, atomic route manifest, explicit required/disabled policy, generic operator secret seam, typed outcomes, value-safe read synthetic/readiness, privacy clearing, observability, migration, rollback, and downstream validation contracts. No spec, scope, report, user validation, scenario manifest, source, test, certification, commit, push, build, or deployment change is claimed.

Reconciled SR-006/GRILL-12: Graph reads the single operator-owned global corpus through explicit role/grant access, rejects ungranted identities without content/count/existence leakage, and makes no tenant/user row-isolation claim. Preserved SCN-080-001-01..08 and added 09. No source, test, design, scope, report, user validation, certification, commit, push, or deployment work is claimed.

Added the '## Corpus Ownership And Authorization Model' section grounding GRAPH-ACT-005/GRAPH-ACT-011 and the spec's Corpus Ownership And Private Access section: one operator-owned global corpus with three authenticated identity classes (operator reads all private content plus operational metadata; grant-holder reads the knowledge-graph:read authorized global projection; ungranted authenticated identity receives a leak-free unauthorized-scope 403 denial with no content/counts/existence hints), no tenant or per-user row isolation. Specified SCN-080-001-09 behavior; extended the Testing And Validation Strategy table through SCN-080-001-09; added single-global-corpus authorization to Purpose/Scope and Resolved Decisions. artifact-lint PASSED (exit 0); traceability-guard unchanged at its prior report-evidence-residual level (13 report-missing-evidence failures for not-yet-created tests; scenario coverage still SCN-01..08).
